inputs.label: Current Energy Usage (kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Total energy consumption in the baseline period (e.g., monthly).

inputs.label: Energy Cost per kWh ($)
inputs.businessContext: Cost per kilowatt-hour from the utility bill or energy contract.

inputs.label: Efficiency Improvement (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage reduction in energy usage due to conservation measures.

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Period
inputs.businessContext: Total operating hours in the analysis period (e.g., 720 hours per month).

inputs.label: CO₂ Emission Factor (kg/kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Carbon dioxide emission per kWh for the energy source (e.g., grid average).
